final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a tech-forward e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a bold hero-layout composition — exact framing and hierarchy are yours
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 brand identity and 618 anniversary sale as the focal theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a festive campaign atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, celebratory energy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 绿联 brand identity and 618 promotional energy — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (hero number), "周年庆" (event label)
Constraints: must read as an e-commerce announcement poster
Avoid:
